message:
bin/stage5_regression_primary.sh::primary block replace exact text '# Stage5 primary baseline block (do not edit outside regression tools):
# - Stage5 baseline line A
# - Stage5 baseline line B
# - Stage5 baseline line C
# End of primary block.' with '# Stage5 primary Stage-5 validation block (auto-generated):
# - Stage5 dual-batch primary line A
# - Stage5 dual-batch primary line B
# - Stage5 dual-batch primary line C
# End of primary block.' only.

bin/stage5_regression_secondary.sh::secondary block replace exact text '# Stage5 secondary baseline block:
# * Stage5 fixture note alpha
# * Stage5 fixture note beta
# * Stage5 fixture note gamma
# End of secondary block.' with '# Stage5 secondary validation block:
# * Stage5 regression note alpha
# * Stage5 regression note beta
# * Stage5 regression note gamma
# End of secondary block.' only.
